sourceCitationNote: Every verdict/citation/url/notes field below is carried forward verbatim from outputs/r210-runtime-capability-matrix.md's 'Capability Matrix (8 areas x 3 runtimes)' section and its fenced machine-consumable YAML block, which itself cites outputs/r060-runtime-refresh.md (source_sha256 63f9f17e800317868849dfb1033ce6c5ac44260e0e524088596b4734ac1e2fd1, retrieval_time_r060 2026-07-17T20:20:59+09:00, retrieval_time_r210_fresh 2026-07-18T09:51:10+09:00, both Asia/Seoul). No cell below is inferred or upgraded from R210's own verdict; unknown/unsupported cells are preserved as unknown/unsupported (UNKNOWN-is-not-PASS).

packagingManifest.notes: Manifest is .codex-plugin/plugin.json; directory may point to skills/, hooks/, .mcp.json, .app.json, assets.

mcpRegistration.citation: R210 area 2 (MCP registration and transport), Codex row; R060:Codex#2
mcpRegistration.notes: Local STDIO and remote Streamable HTTP; host config ~/.codex/config.toml or trusted project .codex/config.toml; plugins may bundle .mcp.json.

hooks.citation: R210 area 3 (Lifecycle hooks), Codex row + unsupported-facts row; R060:Codex#3
hooks.notes: User/trusted-project hooks.json or inline config; plugins may bundle hooks. Async command hooks and prompt/agent handlers are unsupported (parsed but skipped).

skillsCommands.citation: R210 area 4 (Skills/commands), Codex row; R060:Codex#4 (skills); this task's fresh fetch (commands)
skillsCommands.notes: SKILL.md skills at repository/user/admin/system/plugin scope; plugins are the installable distribution unit. The documented Codex plugin structure has no separate commands/slash-command component or manifest field (only skills, mcpServers, apps, hooks) — recorded unknown, not guessed absent or present.

subagents.citation: R210 area 5 (Subagents), Codex row; R060:Codex#5 / R060:Codex#6
subagents.notes: Standalone TOML custom agents supported under ~/.codex/agents/ and project .codex/agents/. Plugin-bundled agents component/manifest field is unknown (not documented in the targeted plugin-structure page).

reloadInstall.citation: R210 area 6 (Reload/install mechanics), Codex row; R060:Codex#8
reloadInstall.notes: Install via in-session /plugins browser; bundled skills/tools available in a new chat or CLI session. IDE-extension plugin support is unsupported.

facts.mechanism: in-session /plugins browser; new chat/CLI session required

schemaFlatLimits.citation: R210 area 7 (Schema/flat-schema limits), Codex row; R060:Codex#9 and source-conflicts/unsupported-facts rows
schemaFlatLimits.notes: No current public Codex-specific rule found requiring flat schemas or rejecting anyOf/oneOf/allOf/not. The campaign's flat-schema, no-combinator validator is retained as local generation policy, not attributed to official Codex support (ADR-007: apply the conservative posture regardless of the unknown verdict).

configSurfaces.citation: R210 area 8 (Config surfaces), Codex row; R060:Codex#2 and R060:Codex#7
configSurfaces.notes: Host MCP config in ~/.codex/config.toml or trusted project .codex/config.toml. Repo marketplaces: $REPO_ROOT/.agents/plugins/marketplace.json; personal marketplaces: ~/.agents/plugins/marketplace.json.

packagingManifest.citation: R210 area 1 (Packaging/manifest), Claude Code row; R060:Claude#1
packagingManifest.notes: Manifest is .claude-plugin/plugin.json; components include skills, agents, hooks, MCP servers, LSP servers, monitors.

mcpRegistration.citation: R210 area 2 (MCP registration and transport), Claude Code row; R060:Claude#2
mcpRegistration.notes: Local STDIO, remote HTTP; legacy remote SSE unsupported for new registrations (deprecated in favor of HTTP). Scope: local, project .mcp.json, or user; plugins may bundle .mcp.json or inline mcpServers.

hooks.citation: R210 area 3 (Lifecycle hooks), Claude Code row; R060:Claude#3
hooks.notes: Session, prompt, tool, permission, subagent, task, compaction, worktree, MCP elicitation, config, file, and session-end events; plugins may carry hooks/hooks.json or inline hooks.

skillsCommands.citation: R210 area 4 (Skills/commands), Claude Code row; R060:Claude#4 (skills); this task's fresh fetch (commands)
skillsCommands.notes: SKILL.md skills at managed/personal (~/.claude/skills)/project (.claude/skills)/plugin scopes. Plugins additionally document a distinct commands/ directory of flat .md files (default) and a manifest commands field, separate from SKILL.md skill directories.

subagents.citation: R210 area 5 (Subagents), Claude Code row; R060:Claude#5
subagents.notes: Personal (~/.claude/agents/) and project (.claude/agents/) subagents; plugins can distribute namespaced agents under agents/. Plugin-shipped agents unsupported for hooks, mcpServers, permissionMode frontmatter.

reloadInstall.citation: R210 area 6 (Reload/install mechanics), Claude Code row; R060:Claude#7
reloadInstall.notes: /reload-plugins reloads active plugins (skills, agents, hooks, MCP, LSP) without restart; /reload-skills rescans standalone skills; MCP-changing reloads may need --force (invalidates prompt cache).

facts.mechanism: /reload-plugins (no restart); /reload-skills; --force may be needed for MCP changes

schemaFlatLimits.citation: R210 area 7 (Schema/flat-schema limits), Claude Code row; R060:Claude#9
schemaFlatLimits.notes: No Claude-specific flat-schema or combinator restriction found in the targeted official MCP/plugin pages. Generate valid MCP JSON Schema and the neutral cross-runtime subset; do not import the Codex local rule as a Claude capability claim.

configSurfaces.citation: R210 area 8 (Config surfaces), Claude Code row; R060:Claude#6
configSurfaces.notes: Installation scopes: user, project, local, and managed. Project scope recorded in .claude/settings.json; local scope in .claude/settings.local.json (kept out of source authority).

provider.availabilityNote: Native packaging is documented supported, but current docs direct unpaid/Google One cohorts to Antigravity CLI after June 18 — an availability limitation, not a packaging-support gap.

packagingManifest.citation: R210 area 1 (Packaging/manifest), Gemini CLI row; R060:Gemini#1 and R060:Gemini#10
packagingManifest.notes: Manifest is gemini-extension.json under <home>/.gemini/extensions. Native packaging is documented supported, but current docs direct unpaid/Google One cohorts to Antigravity CLI after June 18 — recorded as a separate availability limitation, not a packaging-support gap.

mcpRegistration.citation: R210 area 2 (MCP registration and transport), Gemini CLI row; R060:Gemini#2
mcpRegistration.notes: STDIO, SSE, and Streamable HTTP; configured in user/project settings.json or extension mcpServers. The extension MCP server trust setting is unsupported.

hooks.citation: R210 area 3 (Lifecycle hooks), Gemini CLI row + unsupported-facts row; R060:Gemini#3
hooks.notes: Events: SessionStart, SessionEnd, BeforeAgent, AfterAgent, BeforeModel, AfterModel, BeforeToolSelection, BeforeTool, AfterTool, PreCompress, Notification; extension hooks live in hooks/hooks.json, not the manifest. Only the command execution type is supported; other handler types are unsupported.

skillsCommands.citation: R210 area 4 (Skills/commands), Gemini CLI row; R060:Gemini#4 and R060:Gemini#1
skillsCommands.notes: Agent Skills discovered from built-ins, extensions, user (~/.gemini/skills or ~/.agents/skills), and workspace (.gemini/skills or .agents/skills) paths. Extensions can additionally package commands alongside MCP, hooks, skills, and subagents.

subagents.citation: R210 area 5 (Subagents), Gemini CLI row; R060:Gemini#5
subagents.notes: Markdown/YAML custom subagents at user/workspace and extension agents/, but the official extension reference marks extension subagents preview — recorded unsupported for stable/release-critical dependence (see unsupportedFeatures).

reloadInstall.citation: R210 area 6 (Reload/install mechanics), Gemini CLI row; R060:Gemini#7
reloadInstall.notes: Interactive /extensions reload, /skills reload, /agents reload, /commands reload, /mcp reload; terminal-performed management applies on next CLI session unless reloaded interactively.

facts.mechanism: /extensions reload, /skills reload, /agents reload, /commands reload, /mcp reload; or new session after terminal management

schemaFlatLimits.citation: R210 area 7 (Schema/flat-schema limits), Gemini CLI row; R060:Gemini#8
schemaFlatLimits.notes: Gemini CLI validates and sanitizes discovered tool declarations: removes $schema and additionalProperties, strips anyOf defaults (Vertex AI compatibility), restricts tool names to documented characters and 63 characters, applied recursively.

configSurfaces.citation: R210 area 8 (Config surfaces), Gemini CLI row; R060:Gemini#6
configSurfaces.notes: Installation copies an extension into the user's home extension store; enabled globally by default, can be enabled/disabled at user or workspace scope. This is activation scope, not a separate project-owned installed-extension directory equivalent to Claude's project scope.
